About

Systems thinking,
applied to intelligence.

I'm an AI Engineer who likes finishing things — not just training a model, but taking it from a messy dataset to a deployed service someone actually uses. My work sits across Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI and Retrieval‑Augmented Generation, with a strong focus on turning business requirements into AI products that hold up in production: versioned data, evaluated models, monitored APIs.

Based in Mansoura, Egypt
Studying Artificial Intelligence, Delta University
Focus LLMs · RAG · AI Agents · CV
Languages Arabic (native) · English (professional)

Selected Work

Two products,
built end‑to‑end.

MODEL GEN X — screenshot image goes here

10/2025 — Present

MODEL GEN X

AI‑Powered AutoML, Deep Learning & RAG Platform

A platform that lets users build, train and deploy ML, Deep Learning and RAG‑based solutions through a conversational interface — covering automated and manual workflows, multiple data sources and scalable training infrastructure.

  • AutoML system automating preprocessing, model selection, tuning and deployment
  • LLM‑powered assistant guiding the full AI development lifecycle
  • Six RAG architectures: Naive, Hybrid, Graph, Agentic, Multimodal, Corrective
  • Scalable training pipelines on VPS infrastructure
PythonTensorFlowPyTorchFastAPILangChainLangGraphVPS
modelgenx.site
MAFQOOD — screenshot image goes here

10/2024 — Present

MAFQOOD

AI‑Powered Child Reunification System

A web application that helps reunite missing children with their families using facial recognition, LLMs and automation — supporting multimodal search, chatbot‑assisted retrieval and age‑progressed image generation.

  • Deep learning face‑matching pipeline using MagFace embeddings
  • Multimodal search combining image matching with an LLM + RAG chatbot
  • AI age‑progression module to estimate current appearance
  • n8n automation for continuous matching, merging and alerting
PythonTensorFlowOpenCVMagFaceFastAPIn8n
mafqood.site
